parents.subject: LU-18079 tests: updating getquota() in sanity-quota

commit.subject: LU-18441 tests: replacing getquota() in helper functions
commit.message:
LU-18441 tests: replacing getquota() in helper functions

Replaced getquota() and single bracket conditionals in helper methods
for the following:

quota_show_check()
check_system_is_clean()

Signed-off-by: Frederick Dilger <fdilger@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I1de96e5507f29fe4ab505ec47a9e260c03848194
